uplink.description: Real Time frame: instantaneous indoor temperature + relative humidity (covers the climate category)
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (origin-plus-codec.js); temp code 523 -> 22.3 C, hum code 46 -> 23 %RH. Upstream mislabels the humidity unit as C; normalized to air.relativeHumidity here.

uplink.description: Real Time frame: temperature sensor error (code 1023) suppressed, humidity retained
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; temp code 1023 = Error sentinel (suppressed), hum code 120 -> 60 %RH.

uplink.description: Smoke Alarm frame: carries ambient temperature only
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; Smoke Alarm temp code 723 -> 36.4 C. Smoke-alarm status fields are device diagnostics, not normalized.

uplink.description: Air Quality (daily) frame: min/max/avg temperature and humidity; averages map to vocabulary, min/max are extras
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; tMin 480->18, tMax 560->26, tAvg 520->22 C; hMin 80->40, hMax 120->60, hAvg 100->50 %RH.
expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; battery code 100 -> 100*5 + 2000 = 2500 mV = 2.5 V.

uplink.description: Unsupported message type (0x01 Product Configuration carries no climate data) returns an error
uplink._note: Product Configuration is a diagnostics frame with no temperature/humidity; our codec only decodes the climate-bearing message types 0x00, 0x02, 0x03, 0x04.

uplink.description: Wrong product byte (0xB1 = Origin+, not Guard+) returns an error
uplink._note: upstream typeOfProduct does not gate on the product byte; our codec rejects non-0xB3 frames since the Guard+ family shares one decoder.
